sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates AS SELECT changeSecond(toDate('2023-01-01'), 30) AS modified_date;
UPDATE test_dates SET modified_date = changeSecond(modified_date, 20) WHERE modified_date = toDateTime('2023-01-01 12:00:30');
SELECT changeSecond(modified_date, 10) AS new_modified_date FROM test_dates;
